hypothesis: Adding explicit body structure rule — CMI 4-stage outline (reader pain → product as solution → proof via specifics → seasonal/urgency CTA) combined with Copyblogger objection principle (answer the most common buyer hesitation with a real number, timeline, or certification before the CTA) — will push consistent draft quality from 9 to 10/10 by engineering the body with the same precision as the lede. Evidence: exp_3 kept at 9 with lede engineered; scout signals (Apr 29) confirmed CMI framework + Copyblogger objection FAQs as the next structural lever. Lede gate already validated — body is the remaining gap.
learning: NULL/gate-blocked outcome — null #2. Service-page standby still in effect; no content produced during the 48h window. CMI 4-stage body structure rule preserved in surface. Escalation at null #3 per feedback_autoresearch_gate_dependent_metric.md.
changes_description: Added CMI 4-stage body structure rule to surface: reader pain → product as solution → proof via specifics (named expert, timeline, spec, or stat) → objection answer + CTA with real number/timeline before closing. Vary proof type across batch. Builds on exp_3/exp_4 lede engineering by applying same precision to body structure. Scout signals applied: CMI framework + Copyblogger objection FAQs (Apr 29 scout message).
